name: Dill Sauce with Scallops Over Angel Hair Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, sauté shallots in 1/2 cup butter until translucent.
2. Add flour and cook the roux for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
3. Gradually add heavy cream and half and half, bringing to a simmer.
4. Whisk the mixture into the roux and cook for 5-10 minutes until thickened.
5. Stir in Tabasco sauce, dill, salt, and white pepper; keep warm.
6. In a skillet, sauté scallops in 1 tablespoon butter for 2-3 minutes.
7. Add wine to the scallops and incorporate into the cream sauce.
8. Serve over cooked angel hair pasta.
